title: JUSTOP Dummy CCTV Camera, Solar Powered, LED Security Flood Lights With PIR Motion Sensor, Waterproof Outdoor Use - White

Professional design, larger size, higher visibility, deters Theft, Robbery, Vandalism, without the High Cost of Real CCTV Security Cameras and DVR

The floodlight is automatically triggered when motion is detected at a distance of 10M, range of 120 degrees at night. Perfect for garden, yard, lawn, patio, garage, porch, driveway, and landscape security.
With flashing red LED lights and a reality-looking antenna. Weather-proof, can be used outdoors.

description: Solar powered Outdoor dummy camera With Wireless Motion Sensor And LED flood light: This 2-in-1 device combines a solar-powered LED security light with a realistic dummy CCTV camera. It features 2x Ultra bright COB LEDs, a PIR motion sensor, flashing LEDs. The IP66 waterproof design makes it ideal for outdoor use. Features - Constant 24-hour flashing red LED - Red LED ring around the lens during night time - Dual strong COB LED flood lights - PIR motion sensor - Built-in solar panel - Built-in rechargeable battery - Weatherproof housing - Suitable for Outdoor use - Impossible to detect from a real security camera - Wall bracket, adjusts to almost any angle - 100% wireless, no wiring is needed - Dimensions: 18 x 9 x 7cm Fitting Instructions: Installing a solar-powered dummy CCTV camera is a straightforward process, but ensuring proper placement and secure mounting is key to making it look authentic. Here’s a step-by-step guide to help you set it up: Choose the Location: - Pick a spot with good sunlight exposure to keep the solar panel charged. - Ensure the camera is visible to deter potential intruders. Prepare the Mounting Surface - If installing on a wall, use a drill to create holes for the mounting screws. - If attaching to a pole or fence, secure it with cable ties or brackets. Attach the Camera - Use the provided screws and anchors to fix the camera in place. - Adjust the angle to mimic a real surveillance setup. Package Contents - Dummy security camera solar powered - Screws pack - CCTV Warning sticker
